question: How are market returns and inflation modeled in the v1 Monte Carlo?
options: Independent normal draws with per-Scenario mean/SD and no return cap
context: Depends on 9032d3c9 (improve out of the gate) and 2949f831 (Scenario model). Excel: return N(9.51%,7.04%) capped at +20%, inflation N(3.7%,2.8%). Historical bootstrap deferred to post-v1 as an alternative sampling model per Scenario.
